## Summary

Brief description of what this PR does and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (adds functionality)
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Code quality/refactoring
- [ ] Test improvement

## Related issue

Fixes #(issue number) or Related to #(issue number)

## Changes

- Concise bullet points of what changed
- Why the change was needed
- How the change works

## Testing

Explain how you tested this change:

- [ ] Ran full test suite (`python3 tests/test_system.py`)
- [ ] Added new tests for this change
- [ ] Verified no existing tests broke
- [ ] Manual testing (describe)
- [ ] Performance impact (if applicable)

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated relevant `.md` files
- [ ] Updated `SKILL.md` if user-facing change
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Added docstrings (if code change)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] No external dependencies added
- [ ] Python 3.8+ compatible
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] No new warnings or errors

## Breaking changes

Does this PR introduce any breaking changes? If yes, describe:

- What breaks
- Migration path for users
- Why the breaking change was necessary

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots for UI/documentation changes.

## Additional context

Any other information reviewers should know.
